arts.ttl: Everton and West Ham have ‘convincing arguments’ for manager – Hammers have the advantage
arts.sum: Portuguese manager Sergio Conceiçao has receiving ‘convincing arguments’ from Everton and West Ham United but would prefer the latter if it came to a choice between the pair and even Nantes. That’s according to L’Equipe, who cover reports that Nantes are looking at the former Porto coach as a possible replacement for Antoine Kombouaré. arts.sum: Arsenal expert Charles Watts admits that he had flashbacks to the Gunners' 4-4 draw with Newcastle United during their 5-2 victory over West Ham United at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson favourite open to Ruud van Nistelrooy reunion at Leicester City
arts.sum: Sir Alex Ferguson's former Manchester United assistant Rene Meulensteen has already admitted he would be happy to help Ruud van Nistelrooy should the new Leicester City boss contact him. Van Nistelrooy was appointed the Foxes' new manager last week after the previous boss, Steve Cooper, was sacked.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals what he told Ruud van Nistelrooy about Leicester City as new era dawns
arts.sum: He also spoke of his friendship with former Foxes boss Maresca, who guided the club back into the Premier League at the first time of asking last season. Ruud van Nistelrooy revealed during his inaugural Leicester City conference on Monday that he spoke to Enzo Maresca before accepting the manager’s job at the King Power Stadium.
